data.name: OnlyDefense
data.detailed_description:
Marty Clumsby has a cursed dick — and it’s full of dangerously powerful magical essence!

Life was already hard enough (pun intended), but now Marty’s erection has become a ticking time bomb... and everyone around him has "strange" ideas on how to help.

By day, Marty desperately searches for answers about his curse in a university full of suspicious professors, seductive classmates, and "helpful" counselors who may or may not want to milk him dry.

Every hallway hides a new awkward encounter... and some very tight challenges.

Build ridiculous towers. Survive seductive assaults. Defend your hard tower... or get absolutely wrecked.

By night, he’s pulled into a dream world where he must survive chaotic, sexy tower defense battles.

Armies of lustful factions: orc warrior queens, horny witches, cumthirsty cumpiresses, and mischievous fey are desperate to drain the magic straight from his cock for their own twisted purposes.

In return, if he wins, his skills improve and he gets better - both by day and night.

  • Branched Narrative: Choose your adventure in hundreds of choices, open map, and more than 200.000 words of branching narrative

  • Tower Defense: Build towers and cast spells to fend off 5 lustful factions determined to milk you dry in total of 20 levels (100 waves) of ridiculous enemies

  • Quests: Uncurse your dick through more than 50 hilarious quests, side-quests and events to progress, unlock animations, meet new characters, and win your secret crush

  • Ridiculous RPG: Improve your stats, collect bonuses, and roll the dice to test your skills

  • Meet 15+ characters including your secret crush, dominant queens, cursed witches, thirsty monsters, and more

--------

Defend your load. Resist the pleasure. Save your heart.

data.short_description: You play as Marty Clumsby who got far more than he bargained for. Cursed below the belt by mischievous fay magic, he must seek answers through visual novel-style encounters with strange professors and grow stronger by defeating lustful factions in wild, erotic tower defense battles.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5 or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel Iris / AMD Vega or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel 7th Gen or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvida GTX Series 10 or equivalent onboard
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
